'''lazuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibuprofen|ibuprofen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibuprofen|ibuprofen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzithith|læzithith]] || [[word:læzithij|læzithij]] || [[word:læzithish|læzithish]] || [[word:læzithi|læzithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazuzuthuth|lazuzuthuth]] || [[word:lazuzuthuj|lazuzuthuj]] || [[word:lazuzuthush|lazuzuthush]] || [[word:lazuzuthu|lazuzuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazuthuth|lazuthuth]] || [[word:lazuthuj|lazuthuj]] || [[word:lazuthush|lazuthush]] || [[word:lazuthu|lazuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazufthuth|lazufthuth]] || [[word:lazufthuj|lazufthuj]] || [[word:lazufthush|lazufthush]] || [[word:lazufthuf|lazufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazuthuthu|lazuthuthu]] || [[word:lazuthuju|lazuthuju]] || [[word:lazuthushu|lazuthushu]] || [[word:lazuthuku|lazuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazuthuth|lazuthuth]] || [[word:lazuthuj|lazuthuj]] || [[word:lazuthush|lazuthush]] || [[word:lazuthu|lazuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazuthuthul|lazuthuthul]] || [[word:lazuthujul|lazuthujul]] || [[word:lazuthushul|lazuthushul]] || [[word:lazuthukul|lazuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazuthuthuthu|lazuthuthuthu]] || [[word:lazuthujuju|lazuthujuju]] || [[word:lazuthushushu|lazuthushushu]] || [[word:lazuthuku|lazuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazuthuthun|lazuthuthun]] || [[word:lazuthujun|lazuthujun]] || [[word:lazuthushun|lazuthushun]] || [[word:lazuthukun|lazuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazuthuthuoro|lazuthuthuoro]] || [[word:lazuthujuoro|lazuthujuoro]] || [[word:lazuthushuoro|lazuthushuoro]] || [[word:lazuthukuoro|lazuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
